stages.objective: Observe repeated-access behavior under tight frame pressure.
stages.goal: Explain why revisited pages may still fault.
stages.theory_detail: When working set exceeds frame capacity, earlier pages are evicted and can fault again on revisit.

hints.nudge: Track frame capacity against unique pages.
hints.concept: Repetition does not guarantee hits if eviction has occurred.
hints.explicit: Map each access to likely resident set before checking counters.

stages.goal: Pass exact fault count and trace evidence checks.

hints.nudge: Use both trace and fault counters.
hints.concept: Pressure scenarios are deterministic for a fixed sequence and frame count.
hints.explicit: Recompute expected not-present count and compare to observed value.

stages.objective: Tune capacity to reduce pressure effects.
stages.goal: Improve fault profile while preserving required trace behavior.

hints.concept: Small capacity gains can shrink repeated fault windows.
hints.explicit: Apply one change, rerun, and validate lte fault condition plus trace checks.
